claim: Trust comes from visible runtime control, not abstract claims.

composition.structure: left concept block plus right execution object
composition.alignment_logic: two-column layout with shared top line and object-centered right column
composition.asymmetry: right-heavy because the runtime object carries the page authority
composition.image_usage: object-like terminal panel acts as the hero visual instead of a decorative image

why_it_works: The hero object turns an abstract trust claim into a concrete runtime story.
The page is asymmetric but still aligned, so it feels designed rather than messy.
Highlight colors are used to stage hierarchy, not to decorate every element.
anti_patterns: Do not flatten this into two equal cards.
Do not replace the terminal object with bullets only.

do_not_copy_blindly: Do not copy exact chrome details from the source screenshot.
Do not keep dark theme if the target deck needs a lighter board style.
adaptation_notes: Keep the hero object idea even when the object changes from terminal to control panel.
